subcodes.first_line: The All-Bountiful hath come, and crieth out: "To Me, to Me, O people of mystic knowledge!" The All-Merciful hath come, and saith: "Hasten!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الکریم و یقول الی الی یا اهل العرفان قد اتی الرحیم و یقول اسرعوا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @call to action
